## 🎯 Severity (Self-Assessment)

- [ ] 🔴 **P0 — Critical** — System unusable, data loss, security
- [ ] 🟠 **P1 — High** — Major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 **P2 — Medium** — Feature broken, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 **P3 — Low** — Minor issue, cosmetic

**Impact:**

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### Reproduction Rate

- [ ] 100% (always happens)
- [ ] ~50% (sometimes)
- [ ] Rare (hard to reproduce)
- [ ] Happened once
